shared_patterns.pattern: questions about card issues
questions starting with 'what do i do if' or 'why doesn't'
similar structure in addressing issues with cards and transactions
repetitive mention of exchange rate issues
use of formal language and phrasing
questions about card functionality
repeated structure of expressing confusion or frustration
similar phrasing regarding charges and transactions
use of short, direct sentences
questions starting with 'what do i do if'
repetitive structure of 'why are/what do i do if/why did'
i see that my payment is still pending.
what should i do in this situation?
i just checked my account and saw a charge i didn't authorize.
what’s up with that?
i attempted to [action] with my card
my card [issue] and i've tried several times
could you please [request]?
i received the card [time frame] and was successful using it previously
informal language and phrasing
similar sentence structures
use of 'why' to start questions
expressions of confusion or frustration
i don't know what's wrong with my card
i have an odd payment in my statement
what are the steps to get my card back
a fee came along with me paying with card
i think that my card has been stolen
payment done with my card which i definitely did not do
i have a payment i didn't make on my account
why are all my card payments being declined?
